Thais/Horla/Murphy/Ham
can only run two different realms on a team

Hello, most units work.

Blue
Caecus

ty ty

And newbies like me also dont know how to bulid a team for specific chapter boss so im trying so find well bulit team
you can ask here instead of copying others
can check cheri's guide too to see what covs & wheels to put, etc
Someone cleared with worse condition then me with bulid and units that I have so its obvious I'll test it first instead ask
u transfer fiamma around?
Don't know what that's mean
Kath has a mechanic called fiamma
it improves her cards based on its number of stacks
Read Kath's kit again and figure out how fiamma works, it's the fire effect
That I know but what means transfer it
you pass around fiamma when you user her cards
the flame stacks
i mean you pass her fiamma to her other cards in hand when you use her card that has fiamma
you would ideally pass around her fiamma to get very strong effects like you'd pass around a joint in your circle of friends to be higher and higher
when u play a card with fiama u add 1 stack of fiamma to anotjer kath card in hand

kath is not a braindead unit to use

use feast cov on Kathy, not life drain
player skill is important in this game
its not like other gachas
u can have a full whale team and still fail if u dont know how to pilot the comp

Arc 2 Limiteds (Astral Reign) can only be acquired from limited banners, while Arc 1 Limiteds can technically spook you on standard banner. The chance for arc 1 Limiteds to spook you on standard banner is very rare, however

content: Cheri handbook ^

likely skill issue cuz this comp will sweep everything till ch9
u wanna save mutiple 4 costs and shit all of them out on the same turn
Rerolling is pointless in this game. But if you got the time and saw a currently running limited unit feel free to burn out rolling

agreed, i also think i have skill issue. But my problem goes a tinge deeper than that, 

1. Sometimes the boss would have second phase which allows them to be immune at the start of their next phase, making the rest of my flails useless. 

2.Or by the time the flails get into my hands my team are already dying, or the deck is too clogged with sh*t cards that reduces my HP
you dont have to use all your flails at once
i also didnt use all of them, but then next turn 2 or 3 of my flails would disappear, and i dont know why
for multi phase bosses u just measure out the number of flails u need
and use the fleeting ones first
your flails are disappearing bc those are the ones you copied with thais
they only last until end of turn
i see, thanks, maybe i shoulda read more
